value: **New features** require a GitHub issue assigned to a milestone before implementation starts. **Bug fixes** (including lint debt, broken builds, regressions) found during other work can be fixed inline without a pre-filed issue. The rule guards against feature scope creep, not against fixing things that are already broken. When in doubt: would this expand user-visible capability? Yes → issue first. No → fix it. See project.tracking for issue/milestone conventions.
